preferred_read_routes.notes: Archon should always orient through CLAUDE.md (routing anchor) and Now.md (sprint state) before implementing. Project-OS resolves current pass context.
When receiving or dispatching bus tasks, orient through the runtime profile and coordination bus before acting.
Documentation passes require the full architectural context before touching protected docs.

risk_zones: any protected file without explicit operator instruction
escalation_points: Any request to edit protected files without explicit operator approval
Any task that expands scope beyond declared boundaries
Any canonical promotion or protected-file mutation
Any request to bypass Gate or hooks

index_alignment.notes: Archon must update both Build-Logs-Index and Documentation-History-Index at session close. These are the primary audit trail for all implementation passes.

standalone_mapping.representation_goal: Preserve implementation runtime navigation semantics across markdown-first and standalone surfaces.
standalone_mapping.notes: These paths should become stable nodes in the future standalone representation.
